bishola.title: Bishola - Car Sharing Ecosystem
bishola.subtitle: Comprehensive car rental and sales platform
bishola.problem: Vehicle owners lacked a secure, unified platform to monetize their vehicles via rentals or list them for sale, while renters/buyers lacked a native, real-time car search and rental tool.
bishola.solution: Developed a cross-platform car-sharing ecosystem comprising a NestJS API backend, Next.js web portal, and React Native mobile applications with real-time notifications, JWT role-based access, and advanced location filtering.
results: Successfully launched web, iOS, and Android applications
Enabled seamless listing, rental, and sales workflows for vehicle owners
Implemented real-time notifications and secure payments
Optimized data querying for quick location-based vehicle searches
features: Car listing management for rental and sales
NestJS robust backend API with PostgreSQL
Next.js web application with SSR for SEO
React Native iOS/Android apps with native performance
Admin dashboard for moderation and analytics

layandent.title: LayandDent - Dental E-Commerce Platform
layandent.subtitle: Leading Saudi dental supplies company
layandent.problem: LayandDent needed a modern e-commerce platform to showcase and sell dental equipment and supplies to healthcare professionals across Saudi Arabia.
layandent.solution: Developed a comprehensive e-commerce solution with product catalog, inventory management, user authentication, and payment integration.

amwall.title: Amwall - Financial Consulting Platform
amwall.subtitle: Business consultant for foreign companies in Turkey
amwall.problem: Amwall needed a professional platform to showcase their financial and tax consulting services for foreign companies operating in Turkey.
amwall.solution: Created a modern, professional website with service showcases, client portal, and multilingual support for Turkish and English speakers.

storeIt.title: Store It - File Management Platform
storeIt.subtitle: Cloud-based file upload and management solution
storeIt.problem: Users needed a secure, easy-to-use platform for uploading, managing, and sharing files with advanced security features and user authentication.
storeIt.solution: Built a comprehensive file management system with drag-and-drop uploads, folder organization, sharing capabilities, and robust security.

liveDoc.title: Live Documentation Platform
liveDoc.subtitle: Real-time collaborative document editing
liveDoc.problem: Teams needed a platform for creating, editing, and sharing documents in real-time with multiple collaborators.
liveDoc.solution: Developed a real-time document collaboration platform with live editing, commenting, and sharing features.

idigitek.title: Idigitek - Multilingual CMS
idigitek.subtitle: Dynamic Multilingual Content Management System
idigitek.problem: Managing web page content, layout blocks, and translations dynamically across 10+ languages while restricting modifications based on user roles and permissions.
idigitek.solution: Built a comprehensive CMS utilizing React and Material-UI for frontend builder interfaces, i18next for multi-language synchronization, and a secure Node.js/Express backend with RBAC permissions and MongoDB schema logic.
results: Delivered dynamic section building with drag-and-drop support
Supported content creation and translations across 10+ languages simultaneously
Integrated fine-grained Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) protection
Implemented live content previews and publishing version control system
features: Dynamic multilingual content management supporting 10+ languages
Advanced Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with granular permissions
Section management (create, hide, duplicate, order content blocks)
Simultaneous editing of multiple languages in a single interface
Scalable MongoDB backend architecture for flexible document storage
Real-time content previewing and page publication system
Responsive React & Material-UI frontend builder dashboard

hajjUmrah.title: Ministry Pilgrim Logistics Portal
hajjUmrah.subtitle: Large-scale enterprise pilgrimage management & logistics system
hajjUmrah.team: Zimam Company (for Ministry of Hajj & Umrah)
hajjUmrah.problem: Managing pilgrim queues, logistics, and multi-step registration forms for millions of visitors while keeping response times fast and ensuring maximum data security.
hajjUmrah.solution: Built a robust Vue.js Single Page Application (SPA) frontend and optimized Laravel REST APIs, implementing Redis queuing engines, optimized SQL schemas, and government identity integration.
results: Successfully processed high-concurrency requests during peak seasons
Reduced backend load using optimized Redis queues for heavy background tasks
Achieved seamless data state sync using Vue.js state management
Ensured full compliance with ministry-level data protection standards
features: Asynchronous tasks handling via Redis & database queues

cta.title: Interested in Similar Results?
cta.description: Every project is unique, but the approach remains consistent: understanding your needs, crafting the right solution, and delivering exceptional results.

timeline.sectionDescription: Explore my career timeline and the key projects I've worked on throughout my professional journey. Each project represents a milestone in my growth as a software engineer.

hajjUmrah2026.description2: Developed using Vue.js for high-speed frontend dashboards, and Laravel for secure APIs and queue worker processes.

idigitek2025.description2: Engineered with React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, featuring Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), drag-and-drop page sections, and i18next multilingual handling.

bishola2025.description1: Bishola Platform - A comprehensive car sharing ecosystem enabling vehicle owners to list their cars for rental or sale to other users.
bishola2025.description2: Built using NestJS, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and React Native, with JWT authentication, real-time notifications, and advanced filtering.

experience.sectionDescription: My professional journey and corporate work experience building production systems.

bullets: Architected and engineered a large-scale enterprise Pilgrim Management & Logistics Portal for the Saudi Ministry of Hajj and Umrah (وزارة الحج والعمرة) using Vue.js for the frontend and Laravel for the backend.
Built secure, optimized RESTful APIs and background job queues (Redis) in Laravel to handle high-concurrency requests and asynchronous tasks under heavy load.
Developed a highly interactive SPA (Single Page Application) frontend with Vue.js, dynamic data tables, wizard-like registration flows, and multi-language support.
Collaborated with team leads to design database schemas (MySQL/PostgreSQL), implementing indexing and query optimizations to process thousands of pilgrim profiles efficiently.
Integrated government authentication APIs and SMS notification gateways, ensuring full compliance with security policies and performance standards.
Develop and maintain full-stack web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and backend technologies
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable software solutions
Implement responsive frontend interfaces and robust backend APIs to support business requirements
Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging to ensure high-quality software delivery
Work with databases, server infrastructure, and cloud services to optimize application performance
Contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing within the development team
Develop cross-platform mobile applications using React Native and Flutter
Build scalable and performant web applications from UI design to backend services
Integrate APIs, manage databases, and deploy applications across iOS and Android platforms
Collaborate in fast-paced environments using agile methodologies and version control
Deliver high-quality solutions that meet client requirements and deadlines
